ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the golf course */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the golf course */,
  "number_of_holes" INTEGER /* Number of holes in the course */,
  "course_type" TEXT /* Type of golf course (public, private, municipal) */,
  "rating" REAL /* Course rating */,
  "slope" INTEGER /* Course slope */,
  "yardage" INTEGER /* Course yardage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holes" (
  "hole_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hole */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course the hole belongs to */,
  "hole_number" INTEGER /* Number of the hole */,
  "par" INTEGER /* Par score for the hole */,
  "yardage" INTEGER /* Yardage of the hole */,
  "handicap" INTEGER /* Handicap stroke index for the hole */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hole was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hole was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hole_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holes_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course where the round was played */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Number of the round */,
  "date_played" TEXT /* Date the round was played */,
  "time_played" TEXT /* Time the round was played */,
  "weather_conditions_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather conditions during the round */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the round was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the round was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rounds_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the round the score belongs to */,
  "hole_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hole the score belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the player */,
  "eagle" INTEGER /* Indicates if the score was an eagle */,
  "birdie" INTEGER /* Indicates if the score was a birdie */,
  "par" INTEGER /* Indicates if the score was a par */,
  "bogie" INTEGER /* Indicates if the score was a bogey */,
  "double" INTEGER /* Indicates if the score was a double bogey */,
  "worse" INTEGER /* Indicates if the score was worse than a double bogey */,
  "score_vs_par" INTEGER /* Score compared to par for the hole */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_hole_id FOREIGN KEY ("hole_id") REFERENCES holes ("hole_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "handicap" INTEGER /* Golf handicap of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_rounds" (
  "player_round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-round association */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the round */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player-round association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player-round association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_rounds_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_rounds_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course hosting the tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tournament was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tournament was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournaments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_rounds" (
  "tournament_round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament-round association */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tournament */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the round */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tournament-round association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tournament-round association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_rounds_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_rounds_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the round */,
  "temperature" INTEGER /* Temperature during the round */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Humidity during the round */,
  "wind_speed" INTEGER /* Wind speed during the round */,
  "precipitation" INTEGER /* Precipitation during the round */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the weather condition was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the weather condition was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_conditions_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the round */,
  "clubs_used" TEXT /* List of clubs used during the round */,
  "balls_used" TEXT /* Type of balls used during the round */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the equipment entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the equipment entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_modifications" (
  "modification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modification */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "date_modified" TEXT /* Date the modification was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the modification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the modification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the modification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_modifications_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "hole_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hole */,
  "avg_score" REAL /* Average score for the hole */,
  "better" INTEGER /* Number of times players scored better than par */,
  "eagles" INTEGER /* Number of eagles scored */,
  "birdies" INTEGER /* Number of birdies scored */,
  "pars" INTEGER /* Number of pars scored */,
  "bogeys" INTEGER /* Number of bogeys scored */,
  "doubles" INTEGER /* Number of double bogeys scored */,
  "worse" INTEGER /* Number of scores worse than double bogey */,
  "par_avg" REAL /* Average score compared to par */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_hole_id FOREIGN KEY ("hole_id") REFERENCES holes ("hole_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin, course_manager, data_analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_course_access" (
  "user_course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-course association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-course association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-course association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_course_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_course_access_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "driving_accuracy" REAL /* Driving accuracy percentage */,
  "greens_in_regulation" REAL /* Greens in regulation percentage */,
  "scrambling" REAL /* Scrambling percentage */,
  "putting_average" REAL /* Putting average */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
